data.name: 憤怒屌 Angry Dik
data.detailed_description:
在世界的邊境，有一座傳說中的國度——懶蛋王國。,

這裡的人民生活慵懶，不愛打仗，但特別擅長製造各種奇怪又色情的魔法機關， 並世世代代守護著國家的能量核心——睪動力核心。 他們信仰一位古老又暴躁的守護神：ANGRY DIK。 直到有一天，一群貪婪的女魔神盯上了這對神聖之蛋，妄想將其據為己有。 只要奪下睪動力核心，就能引發無限高潮，支配整個世界的慾望能量！ 眼看信徒們即將被蹂躪，ANGRY DIK震怒下凡，決心保衛他的子民！ 準備迎接憤怒屌的轟擊吧！ "再懶，也要用最硬的方式保衛國家"

■「你馬上就會見識到了」

拉動憤怒屌炮，精準射擊，調整角度與力量，巧妙利用各種魔術機關拘束並制服魔王，讓她們無處可逃，享受戰術與技巧結合的樂趣。

■「是嗎！？要壞掉了嗎！沒錯它就是──我國最新兵器！」

啟動獨特子彈系統，每種子彈皆具備不同特殊效果，無論是讓他身上油膩滑溜的「精華彈」、還是能夠與精華彈觸發大火的「燃燒彈」，或是羞辱感滿滿的「屌魔彈」，都能有效削弱魔王的「羞恥心」，提高「興奮值」帶來豐富多變的戰鬥體驗。

■「哼哼，徹底臣服在我國的最新科技吧！」

成功征服角色後，解鎖精緻美麗的差分CG，並享受完整的角色互動劇情。勝利後各種差分呈現，讓角色在你的科技威能下徹底臣服，滿足你征服與掌控的快感！

  • 創新融合經典憤怒鳥玩法與成人遊戲元素，帶來全新的娛樂體驗，簡單易上手的操作與輕鬆的遊戲節奏完美結合。

  • 豐富的角色設定，每一位角色不僅擁有獨特的性格和故事，更設計了多樣化的互動場景與差分內容，深度滿足不同玩家的喜好與期待。

  • 特殊道具與系統豐富多元，輕鬆解壓的內容，用銅板的價格享受一個4~6小時的愉快旅程。

data.short_description: 《Angry DIK》是一款瑟瑟又有趣的拋射模擬器，玩家將運用人類的科技、智慧、以及...ANGRY DIIIIIK！擊退這些可愛性感又"大意"的女魔神，擊破！燒毀！讓他們開開心心的來憤怒屌王國享受各種魔法機關，並且高高潮潮的離開吧！
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 俄文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 韓文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文, 波蘭文, 泰文, 荷蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Angry Dik
data.detailed_description:
At the edge of the world lies a legendary land—the Kingdom of Lazy Eggs.
Its people live a life of idleness, avoiding war, yet they excel at crafting bizarre and lewd magical contraptions. For generations, they have guarded the nation’s power source—the Testicle Power Core.

They worship an ancient, short-tempered guardian deity: ANGRY DIK.
One day, a covetous group of Demon Goddesses set their eyes on the sacred Eggs, hoping to claim them as their own. Whoever seizes the Testicle Power Core will unleash endless climaxes and dominate the world’s energy of desire!

As his followers faced devastation, ANGRY DIK descended in fury, determined to defend his people.
Prepare yourself for the wrathful bombardment of the Furious Shaft!

"Even in sloth, the hardest defense shall guard the nation."

■ “You’ll witness it soon enough!”
Pull the Furious Shaft Cannon, adjust angle and power, and fire precise shots. Make clever use of magical devices to restrain and subdue Demon Queens, leaving them no chance to escape. Experience the thrill of tactics and skill in perfect synergy.

■ “Is it breaking apart!? Indeed—it’s our kingdom’s newest weapon!”
Activate the unique bullet system, each with special effects: the slippery “Essence Shot,” the fiery “Flame Shot” that reacts with Essence, or the humiliating “Phallus Curse Shot.” Each weakens the Demon Queen’s “Shame” while boosting her “Arousal,” offering a diverse and exhilarating battle experience.

■ “Bow down before the latest technology of our kingdom!”
Conquer characters to unlock exquisite CG variations and enjoy complete interactive stories. After victory, multiple variations show their submission under your technological might, fulfilling your urge to dominate and control.

  • A creative fusion of classic slingshot mechanics and adult game elements, delivering a fresh, provocative gameplay experience.

  • Multiple richly designed characters, each with unique personalities, storylines, interactive scenes, and CG variations to satisfy a wide range of player preferences.

  • A diverse arsenal of special tools and systems, perfect for stress relief. All at an affordable price—offering 4 to 6 hours of intense and satisfying fun.

data.short_description: "Angry DIK" is a lewd and fun projectile simulator where you’ll use human tech, tactics, and ANGRY DIIIIIK to take down sexy, careless demon girls. Break them, burn them, and let them leave the Angry Dik Kingdom smiling and trembling with pleasure!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Russian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Korean, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Turkish, Polish, Thai, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 64bit OS
  • Processor: Core i3
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • Processor: Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
